lines.translation: Go back to your city
There is a touch of emotion in longing
Still like before
Every corner greeted me friendly
Full of meaning
I'm swept away by nostalgia
When we often spend time
Enjoy the atmosphere of Jogja together
At the intersection my steps stopped
Crowded with street vendors
Selling delicious specialties
People sit cross-legged
Street musicians start to act
As I suffer from losing you
Whimpering to myself
Swallowed by the roar of your city

lines.original: Walau kini kau t'lah tiada tak kembali (ho-oh)
lines.translation: Even though now you're gone, you won't come back (ho-oh)
But your city makes your smile eternal

lines.original: Izinkanlah (hmm) aku untuk s'lalu (uu) pulang lagi
lines.translation: Allow (hmm) me to always (uu) go home again

lines.original: Bila hati mulai sepi (ho-oh) tanpa terobati (tak terobati)
lines.translation: When the heart starts to feel lonely (ho-oh) without being cured (unhealed)
Street musicians start to act
As I suffer from losing you
Whimpering to myself
Swallowed by the roar of your city

lines.original: Walau kini kau t'lah tiada tak kembali (tak kembali)
lines.translation: Even though you're gone now, you won't come back (you won't come back)

lines.original: Namun kotamu hadirkan senyummu abadi (senyummu yang nan abadi)
lines.translation: But your city presents your eternal smile (your eternal smile)

lines.original: Ijinkanlah aku untuk s'lalu pulang lagi (untuk s'lalu pulang lagi)
lines.translation: Allow me to always go home again (to always go home again)

lines.original: Bila hati (bila hati) mulai sepi (mulai sepi) tanpa terobati (tanpa terobati)
lines.translation: If the heart (if the heart) starts to get lonely (starts to get lonely) without being healed (without being healed)

lines.original: Walau kini (hoo) engkau telah tiada tak kembali (tak kembali)
lines.translation: Even though now (hoo) you're gone, you're not coming back (not coming back)

lines.original: Namun kotamu hadirkan senyummu abadi (senyummu yang nan abadi)
lines.translation: But your city presents your eternal smile (your eternal smile)

lines.original: Ijinkanlah (ijinkanlah) aku untuk (aku untuk) s'lalu pulang lagi (selalu pulang lagi)
lines.translation: Allow (allow) me to (me to) always come home again (always come home again)

lines.original: Bila hati (bila hati) mulai sepi (mulai sepi) tanpa terobati (tanpa terobati)
lines.translation: If the heart (if the heart) starts to get lonely (starts to get lonely) without being healed (without being healed)

lines.original: Walau kini engkau telah tiada tak kembali (tak kembali)
lines.translation: Even though you're gone now, you won't come back (you won't come back)

lines.original: Namun kotamu hadirkan senyummu abadi (senyummu abadi)
lines.translation: But your city presents your eternal smile (your eternal smile)
